steps.title: Shift to another moon
steps.content: The first two sentences describe Himalia, a Jovian moon with a prograde orbit. The next sentence moves to Carme, another Jovian moon, and describes a retrograde orbit. The transition must signal movement to a different place.

steps.title: Reject same-point signals
steps.content: A would introduce an example of the previous point, but Carme has the opposite orbit type. B would narrow the prior point, not shift subjects. C would restate the prior point, but the sentence introduces different information. The answer is D.
